examples: Map this number to the Roman numeral system.
For instance, take a number from the Arabic numeral system, such as 9.
Now map that back to the Arabic numeral system and you end up with, no surprise, 9.
Energy XXI ( EXXI), whose name utilizes the Roman numeral 21, has been no exception.
The distinctive numeral typeface is named after its originator, legendary 18th-century French horologist Abraham-Louis Breguet .
